    @allure.story("社区成员列表验证昵称")
    @allure.title("【场景】TC-NICK-005 社区大厅成员列表验证昵称")
    @pytest.mark.P1
    def test_verify_nickname_from_member_list(self, community_api, dashen_user_id):
        """从社区大厅成员列表验证昵称修改结果"""
        data = TEST_DATA["community_flow"]
        community = data["community"]
        nick_data = data["nickname"]
    
        dashen_nick = _random_nick(nick_data["dashen_prefix"])
    
        # 先修改昵称
        with allure.step("前置：修改大神社区昵称"):
            community_api.upd_user_server_ext(
                server_id=community["nickname_server_id"],
                server_nick_name=dashen_nick,
            )
    
        # 查询成员列表验证
        with allure.step("查询社区大厅成员列表，验证昵称"):
            resp = community_api.find_all_type_server_member(
                server_id=community["nickname_server_id"],
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
            _assert_ret_code_100(result, "查询社区大厅成员列表")
    
            # 找到大神
            member_list = result.get("retData", {}).get("list", [])
            target = None
            for member in member_list:
                if str(member.get("userId")) == str(dashen_user_id):
                    target = member
                    break

    @pytest.mark.P1
    def test_verify_nickname_from_member_list(self, community_api, dashen_user_id):
        """从社区大厅成员列表验证昵称修改结果"""
        data = TEST_DATA["community_flow"]
        community = data["community"]
        nick_data = data["nickname"]
    
        dashen_nick = _random_nick(nick_data["dashen_prefix"])
    
        # 先修改昵称
        with allure.step("前置：修改大神社区昵称"):
            community_api.upd_user_server_ext(
                server_id=community["nickname_server_id"],
                server_nick_name=dashen_nick,
            )
    
        # 查询成员列表验证
        with allure.step("查询社区大厅成员列表，验证昵称"):
            resp = community_api.find_all_type_server_member(
                server_id=community["nickname_server_id"],
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
            _assert_ret_code_100(result, "查询社区大厅成员列表")
    
            # 找到大神

            target = None

                if str(member.get("userId")) == str(dashen_user_id):

                    break
